# 1ai-Skills
# 1215 Open-Source AI Agent Skills with Self-Evolving Meta-Skills
# https://github.com/oyi77/1ai-skills

## What This Is
1ai-Skills is the largest open-source AI agent skill library. 1215 production-ready skills across 18 categories that enable AI agents to auto-evolve, auto-learn, and auto-improve. Each skill is a self-contained `SKILL.md` with YAML frontmatter (name, description, domain, tags, optional persona) that agents load on demand.

## Installation
```bash
npx skills add oyi77/1ai-skills
# or
git clone https://github.com/oyi77/1ai-skills.git
```

## Agent Discovery Order
1. Read `SKILLS.json` for machine-readable totals per category.
2. Read `AGENTS.md` for category descriptions.
3. For `cybersecurity/` (754 skills), read `cybersecurity/AGENTS.md` for the subdomain map BEFORE loading individual skills.
4. Load only the specific `<category>/<skill-name>/SKILL.md` you need.

Do NOT walk all 1215 skill dirs. Grep `SKILLS.json` first.

## Categories (1215 skills total, 18 categories)

| Category | Skills | Focus |
|---|---:|---|
| cybersecurity/ | 779 | 26 subdomains: threat hunting, forensics, pen testing, red teaming, cloud security, SOC ops, malware analysis, incident response, API security, zero trust, DevSecOps, compliance, OT/ICS, IAM |
| development/ | 78 | TDD, systematic debugging, code review, PRD, git worktrees, Kafka patterns, database ORMs, mobile development, testing, messaging infrastructure, CI/CD, DevOps |
| content/ | 48 | Remotion video engine, video generation, AI podcast, faceless YouTube, humanizer, Seedance, design systems, UI frameworks, content creation, viral marketing |
| devops/ | 37 | Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, GitLab CI, cloud operations, service mesh, GitOps, secrets management, infrastructure as code |
| automation/ | 27 | n8n workflows, WhatsApp/Telegram/Twitter bots, job hunter, scrapers, content publisher, Airflow pipelines, data pipelines, workflow automation |
| marketing/ | 39 | Marketing Ops OS, SEO optimizer, viral marketing, growth engine, Twitter automation, email marketing, affiliate management, ecommerce, ad campaigns |
| core/ | 37 | Self-improvement, memory systems, AI orchestration, session brain, hub memory, LLM/agent infrastructure, AI/ML, continuous learning, self-evolving agents |
| research/ | 28 | McKinsey analysis, deep research, Polymarket analyst, continuous learning, competitive intelligence, market research, trend analysis, web research |
| integrations/ | 27 | Slack, Discord, Notion, GitHub — bots, webhooks, APIs, Kalodata, OhMyOpenCode, team collaboration, integrations, messaging platforms |
| financial/ | 16 | All-in-One Finance (16 modules), Wolf Finance (22 modules), model builder, earnings viewer, pitch deck, commodities, DeFi, crypto forensics, tax-loss harvesting |
| operations/ | 15 | Finance ops, revenue team, project management, payment invoicing, governance, KYC, statement audit, GL reconciliation, team ops, workflow management |
| agents/ | 16 | Research, review, planning, code, deploy, refactor, linter, security, autonomous trading agents, agent orchestration, multi-agent systems |
| meta/ | 14 | find-skills, create-skills, auto-evolve, performance monitor, auto-learner, skill datastore, continuous improvement, self-improving agent system |
| mcp/ | 12 | MCP servers for Slack, GitHub, Notion, Stripe, Supabase, Linear, Resend, financial MCP, Kalodata MCP, agent-to-agent orchestration |
| trading/ | 18 | Black Edge, AlphaEar, Polymarket, Tushare, crypto trading bot, DeFi protocols, smart contracts, NFTs, commodities, algorithmic trading, quant strategies |
| data/ | 10 | Data cleaning, anomaly detection, report generation, visualization, data pipelines, DBT, lakeFS, data versioning, analytics, data science |
| sales/ | 7 | High-ticket closing, lead generation, business development, CRM automation, sales enablement, outreach automation, pipeline management |
| productivity/ | 7 | Google Workspace, calendar, email automation, Notion, daily planner, task management, meeting automation, productivity systems |

## Self-Evolving System (meta/)
13 meta-skills form a self-improving agent operating system:
- auto-evolve: continuous improvement loop
- find-skills: discover community skills when local skills don't cover need
- create-skills: generate new skills when nothing exists
- skill-performance-monitor: track effectiveness in real time
- continuous-learning: confidence-weighted learning from sessions
- self-improving-agent, runtime-self-improvement: agent self-optimization
- meta-orchestrator: coordinates the loop
- (plus performance-monitor, feedback-collector, self-assessment, improvement-generator, skill-evolution, auto-learner)

## Tooling Dirs (not skill homes)
- docs/ — Setup guides (claude, cursor, opencode)
- hooks/ — Git hooks, session-start scripts, auto-evolve hooks
- manifests/ — Submission manifests for Claude App Store, OpenAI GPT Store, LangChain, HF
- references/ — Static checklists (code review, SEO, marketing, trading)
- scripts/ — Audit, install, submission, CLI utilities. Run `bash scripts/audit-skills.sh` to refresh counts.

## Skill Anatomy
```yaml
---
name: skill-name
description: Triggers and use cases.
domain: cybersecurity         # optional
subdomain: malware-analysis   # optional
tags: [tag1, tag2]            # optional
persona:                       # optional
  name: "Expert Name"
  expertise: ["Area1", "Area2"]
---
<markdown body with workflow, examples, references>
```

## Maintenance
- Add a skill: create `<category>/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`, then run `bash scripts/audit-skills.sh --write` to refresh SKILLS.json.
- Counts in README.md, AGENTS.md, and llms.txt MUST match SKILLS.json. Re-run audit before commit.
- All SKILL.md files must start with `---` frontmatter (validated by CI).
